_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: cell populations were highly viable (>94% alive) and were effectively depleted of mouse cells (<1.5% mouse)...Four out of nine (44%) PDX-microtissues tested met these criteria
details: Successfully created from dissociated PDX with >94% cell viability and <1.5% mouse cells. Composed of 12-32 total cells per microtissue with at least 10 viable cells after 48-hour vehicle treatment. Success rate of 44% (4 out of 9 PDX tested met quality criteria)
